description:
All adult tickets include this year’s glass.

[Camping must be booked in advance of the event here.](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSczKZgcVQyzllXyRiDzlN2Y7n29PqDDNf6sczvFDjHjnVLKVg/viewform)

**Please note:** If you get a *‘On the Farm’* glass (this year’s glass) on Friday night and bring it back with you on Saturday you’ll get a beer token instead of another glass.
closedText: Advance Tickets are now closed! However you can still buy them at the entrance to beer fest site

prices.description: Free entry – cash (or card) at the bar – all we ask for is a donation to charity.
Entrance from 7pm. 18 and over and allow to consume alcohol drinks. ID may required if you are lucky enough to look under 25.
Entrance from 7pm. Age 12 to 17 and **NOT** allowed to drink alcohol drink however Non-alcoholic drinks available from the food stand for cash/card. Under 12 are free (no need of ticket)
Entrance from 12pm. Over 18 and allow to consume alcohol drinks. ID may required if you are lucky enough to look under 25.
Entrance from 7pm. Age 12 to 17 and **NOT** allowed to drink alcohol drink however Non-alcoholic drinks available from the food stand for cash/card. Under 12 are free (no need of ticket)
Entrance to both days when open. Over 18 and allow to consume alcohol drinks. ID may required if you are lucky enough to look under 25.

Entrance to both days when open. Age 12 to 17 and **NOT** allowed to drink alcohol drink however Non-alcoholic drinks available from the food stand for cash/card. Under 12 are free (no need of ticket)
[Camping must be registered in advance of the event here.](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSczKZgcVQyzllXyRiDzlN2Y7n29PqDDNf6sczvFDjHjnVLKVg/viewform)
A strip of 5 tokens (£2.40 each token). More token can be purchase on site.
Two strips of 5 tokens (£2.40 each token). More token can be purchase on site.
